allow: Bash(cd c:/CyberPulse/backend && ls -la 2>&1; ls frontend 2>&1; cat ../README.md 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd C:\\CyberPulse\\backend; $env:JWT_SECRET_KEY="test-secret"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:socket_app --port 8077" -RedirectStandardOutput uvicorn_out.log -RedirectStandardError uvicorn_err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8077/api/v1/health -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" }; Get-Content uvicorn_err.log -Tail 40)

PowerShell(cd C:\\CyberPulse\\backend; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -ne $PID} | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item uvicorn_out.log,uvicorn_err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output done)

PowerShell(cd C:\\CyberPulse\\backend; $env:JWT_SECRET_KEY="dev-secret-key"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:socket_app --port 8000" -RedirectStandardOutput uvicorn_out.log -RedirectStandardError uvicorn_err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\CyberPulse\\backend; $env:JWT_SECRET_KEY="dev-secret-key"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:socket_app --port 8090" -RedirectStandardOutput uvicorn_out.log -RedirectStandardError uvicorn_err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8090/api/v1/health -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })
Bash(rm -f app_run.log app_run2.log screenshot_login.png screenshot_check2.png screenshot_check3.png)
Bash(cd /c/CyberPulse/backend && rm -f uvicorn_out.log uvicorn_err.log && echo done)
